TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_apuk, title = apuk, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/apuk} }

S.FORM: == apuk == иҠ’иҚүиҠұ kmal yaya' maku' mha, "slici kwara' qu lmikuy te sesyaw ngasal su'. ki'an apuk lga, hbk'an nya' kwara' tanux su' la. " - жҜҚиҰӘиӘӘ:" ."
== apuk == иҠ’иҚүиҠұ kmal yaya' maku' mha, "slici kwara' qu lmikuy te sesyaw ngasal su'. ki'an apuk lga, hbk'an nya' kwara' tanux su' la. " - жҜҚиҰӘиӘӘ:" ."
S.PHON: == apuk == *** kmal jajaК” makuК” mД§a, "s~Й•liКҰ~КЁi kwaraК” qu lmikuj te s~Й•es~Й•jaw ЕӢas~Й•al s~Й•uК”. kiК”an apuk lЙЈa, Д§ОІkК”an njaК” kwaraК” tanux s~Й•uК” la. " - ***:" ."
